turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, I'd like to report a damage at my rental property.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Can you tell me exactly what kind of damage you’ve noticed at the property?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, so there's a leak coming from the ceiling in the bathroom with a weird smell. I think it is mold

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Is the leak still actively dripping right now, or has it stopped?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: it is still leaking

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Since it’s still dripping, when did you first notice the leak starting?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: i noticed it a week ago when I entered the shower and didn't opened the water, something was leaking from above my head and that's when I looked up and saw it

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. How large is the wet or damaged area on the ceiling now—just a small patch, or has it spread out?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: there's small patch but it did spread a bit on the side of the wall

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Thanks for explaining that. Is there anything like discoloration, strong odor, or any electrical fixtures near the damp area that we should be aware of?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: the spots are quite dark and it smell a bit but other than that there is not electrical fixtures near it

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Since the spots are dark and there’s a smell, that helps a lot. Do you know what’s directly above that bathroom—another bathroom, a kitchen, or another unit?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I live in an apartment so I think there's another bathroom above but I might be mistaken

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Have you had a chance to check with the upstairs neighbor or building management to see if anyone above might be having plumbing issues?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: yes, I went upstairs to ask them if there's any issue with anything like mold but they told me that everything is fine.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Thanks for checking with them. When would be a good time for a maintenance person to come by and inspect the ceiling?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Is tomorrow morning at 8 am good for you ?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Tomorrow at 8 am works. Will you be home to let the maintenance person in, or should they use a building key?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I'll be home, yes, as I work from home

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Since you’ll be home, that’s perfect. What’s the best phone number for the maintenance person to reach you if they need to check in before arriving?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: sure thing, so my number is...404765209.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, everything is noted. Have a nice day !

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thank you very much sir, have a nice day !
